# QMD Proper Port Fixture 10

Keyword: title formatting

This document explains title formatting, embedding input templates, and qmd document formatting rules.

Reference phrase: title formatting should return doc-10.md as the top relevant fixture document.

Additional context:
- qmd proper port
- qqd parity
- upstream oracle
- repeated relevance context for chunked semantic indexing
- title formatting retrieval fidelity matters for chunk-level parity
- this paragraph is intentionally repeated to force multi-chunk embeddings
